content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Gives students a sense of long-term impact.
• Encourages creativity & legacy-building.
• Creates a living history for the course.

📜 5. Brainstorming Question 2: The “True Ending” Path

📜 Should there be a single, secret “True Ending” that only one student can unlock?

✔ If yes, what form should it take?
✔ Should it be a hidden literary reference only one student can find?
✔ Should it be a secret challenge only available in the final weeks?
✔ What should the reward be—permanent legend status?

📜 6. Refining Question 3: Helping Another Student Defeat a Boss

📜 XP bonuses for assisting struggling students now require a trade-off.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 239 (chunk 239/555)
